items.name: head Axis Move tool
items.description: A decorative 3D item that looks like a Roblox Move Tool. It features colorful arrows representing the X, Y, and Z axes — red, green, and blue — giving the appearance of a real editor tool. Although it doesn’t actually function, it’s a fun and realistic prop for building, showcases, or developer-themed environments.
